Summary_Text: Shipment of raw cotton from V-001 (Coimbatore Cotton Mills) was received at Nhava Sheva Port on 14th May 2026. The consignee, reachable at purchasing@lacottonwholesale.com, reported a defect rate of 0% on delivery inspection. Payment was processed on time with no delays.

Cargo of handcrafted home decor from V-002 (Kutch Handicrafts) was flagged at Mundra Port following a quality scan. The buyer, imports@hanzelfoodprocessing.de, was notified. A defect rate of 5.2% was noted in the preliminary unboxing audit. Payment settlement is pending and has been delayed by 12 days.

Inbound inspection at Tuticorin Port confirmed arrival of the second textile batch from V-001 (Coimbatore Cotton Mills). The buyer contact on file is purchasing@lacottonwholesale.com. No defects were recorded, but payment has been delayed by 4 days due to a documentation error at the destination bank.

Vendor V-002 (Kutch Handicrafts) dispatched a secondary artisan consignment which cleared JNPT without incident. The receiving agent, imports@hanzelfoodprocessing.de, confirmed receipt. A minor defect rate of 1.5% was reported, but full payment was processed on schedule with 0 days of delay.
